title: [Webinar] Why Your AppSec Tools Miss the "Lethal Path" (and How to Fix It)
description: TL;DR: Stop chasing thousands of "toast" alerts. Join experts from Wiz and Okta/GitLab to learn how hackers connect tiny flaws to build a "Lethal Chain" to your data—and how to break it. Register for the Strategic Briefing Here. Most security tools work like a smoke alarm that goes off every time you burn a piece of toast. You get so many alerts that you eventually start to ignore them. The real
